title: Apply for the electric vehicle (EV) pavement channels grant
body: "The electric vehicle (EV) pavement channels grant funds local authorities to install cross-pavement channels in England. This will support residents without access to off-street parking to charge their EVs at home and benefit from cheaper, domestic tariffs.  See the electric vehicle pavement channels grant, provided by the LEVI support body, for more information.  Fund objectives  The EV pavement channels grant has the following objectives:   to empower local authorities to adopt pavement channels in their EV strategies as a local charging solution to increase EV uptake by supporting residents without off-street parking to charge at home and benefit from cheaper, domestic tariffs to accelerate the rollout of pavement channels   Apply for EV pavement channels grant  The £25 million capital fund will be available to all Tier 1 local authorities (unitary, county or combined authorities) in England for the financial year 2025 to 2026.  Eligible local authorities will need to demonstrate they meet the criteria, (PDF).  Combined authorities will be allocated and issued funding on behalf of authorities in their region. In London, funding will be made available directly to boroughs.   Local authorities will receive their funding upon successful approval of their application.  Apply directly to the Energy Saving Trust.   Support  The LEVI support body will provide support for local authority officers.  Any queries should be sent to: levi@est.org.uk.  "
